nodes.name: Alex Acosta
nodes.shortBio: Attorney and former United States Secretary of Labor

nodes.name: Alfredo Rodriguez
nodes.shortBio: Chauffeur/Butler/House Manager for Palm Beach,FL residence of Jeffrey Epstein

nodes.name: Ann Wojcicki
nodes.shortBio: American entrepreneur and former CEO of 23andMe

nodes.name: Anthony Scaramucci
nodes.shortBio: Financier and former White House Communications Director

nodes.name: Antoine Verglas
nodes.shortBio: Photographer, emailed Epstein about a drug that can eliminate free will and block memory

nodes.name: Ben Goertzel
nodes.shortBio: Worked at Nowak’s Harvard Program for Evolutionary Dynamics and the MIT Media Lab

nodes.name: Bobby Kotick
nodes.shortBio: American businessman and former CEO of Activision
